data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — added source of merge-state.sh after deps.sh; replaced inline MERGE_HEAD (lines 202-233) and REBASE_HEAD (lines 251-295) blocks with a single ms_filter_to_worktree_only call guarded by ms_is_merge_in_progress || ms_is_rebase_in_progress. Early-exit when all files are incoming-only preserved.
